name: ship-with-ai-skills
description: Reusable Claude Code skills for shipping side projects with AI. Each skill packages a Ship With AI methodology edition (idea-to-first-user harness, multi-agent factory, deploy, launch, code review, dead-project closeout) as a one-command install.

plugins.name: ship-with-ai
plugins.description: All Ship With AI skills in one plugin: autopilot (single-project harness), factory (multi-project org chart), pre-flight (4-question first-user-readiness eval), go-live (deploy), launch-day (first users), night-shift (overnight builds), parallel-build (multi-feature), context-tax (session diagnostic), graveyard (dead-project closeout), collect-feedback (tester pipeline).
